prompt: Create a daylight version of from the given reference photo
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to transform the current night or twilight scene into a bright, clear daylight environment. Replace the dark sky, crescent moon, and stars with a vibrant blue sky featuring soft daytime clouds. The large hand silhouette reaching upwards from the bottom of the frame should remain, along with the distant cityscape on the horizon, but all elements must be re-illuminated to appear as if under a strong daytime sun, changing the current reddish horizon glow to natural, bright daylight.
objects: large hand silhouette reaching upwards from the bottom of the frame
reddish horizon glow (should not be present)
